SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.core.engine

Class AbstractEngine

java.lang.Object
com.orasaka.core.engine.AbstractEngine
Direct Known Subclasses:
Engine
public abstract sealed class AbstractEngine extends Object permits Engine
Sealed abstract base class for the Orasaka AI orchestration engine.

This class defines the contract for all multi-modal AI operations — text chat, image generation, speech synthesis, and token streaming. It is the central inference backbone of orasaka-core, encapsulating:

  • Multi-provider model resolution via EngineModelRegistry
  • Context-Matrix orchestration pipeline integration via OrchestrationPipeline
  • Pre/post-processing interceptor chain via ContextInterceptor
  • Domain event publishing for completed chat interactions

The class is sealed to restrict the engine hierarchy to the single production subclass Engine, enforcing exhaustive pattern-matching safety (ADR-003).

Concurrency: All public methods are designed to execute inside Java 21 Virtual Threads per the concurrency mandate in AGENTS.md. No synchronized blocks are used over I/O loops.

Since:
1.0.0
See Also:
  • Engine
  • EngineModelRegistry
  • EnginePipelineBridge

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractEngine

      protected AbstractEngine(Map<String,org.springframework.ai.chat.model.ChatModel> chat, Map<String,org.springframework.ai.image.ImageModel> img, Map<String,org.springframework.ai.embedding.EmbeddingModel> emb, Map<String,org.springframework.ai.audio.tts.TextToSpeechModel> tts, CoreProperties props, List<ContextInterceptor> interceptors, OrchestrationPipeline pipeline, org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher publisher)
      Constructs the engine with provider model maps, configuration, and pipeline components.

      Model maps are defensively wrapped in an immutable EngineModelRegistry. Interceptors are defensively copied to an unmodifiable list.

      Parameters:
      chat - Map of provider name → ChatModel instances.
      img - Map of provider name → ImageModel instances.
      emb - Map of provider name → EmbeddingModel instances.
      tts - Map of provider name → TextToSpeechModel instances.
      props - Core configuration properties bound from orasaka.core.*.
      interceptors - Ordered list of context interceptors (nullable — defaults to empty).
      pipeline - The orchestration pipeline (nullable — bypassed if null).
      publisher - Spring event publisher for ChatCompletedEvent.

  • Method Details

    • chat

      public InternalChatResponse chat(InternalChatRequest request)
      Executes a synchronous (non-streaming) chat inference.

      Processing flow:

      1. Compiles the full context via EnginePipelineBridge.compileContext(com.orasaka.core.support.InternalChatRequest, com.orasaka.core.pipeline.OrchestrationPipeline, com.orasaka.core.engine.EngineModelRegistry, java.util.List<com.orasaka.core.pipeline.ContextInterceptor>)
      2. Invokes the resolved ChatModel with the assembled prompt
      3. Falls back to tool-stripped inference on IllegalStateException
      4. Runs all post-processing interceptors
      5. Publishes an ChatCompletedEvent
      Parameters:
      request - The internal chat request containing prompt, context, and options.
      Returns:
      The engine's response with generated text, conversation ID, and metadata.
      Throws:
      CoreException - If no suitable ChatModel is found for the resolved provider.

    • stream

      public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<InternalChatResponse> stream(InternalChatRequest request)
      Creates a reactive token stream for real-time chat inference.

      Delegates stream assembly to EngineStreamBridge.createStream(com.orasaka.core.support.InternalChatRequest, com.orasaka.core.pipeline.OrchestrationPipeline, com.orasaka.core.engine.EngineModelRegistry, java.util.List<com.orasaka.core.pipeline.ContextInterceptor>, org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher), which manages the deferred Flux lifecycle, tool fallback, and post-completion event publishing.

      Parameters:
      request - The internal chat request containing prompt, context, and options.
      Returns:
      A Flux emitting incremental InternalChatResponse chunks.

    • generateImage

      public InternalImageResponse generateImage(InternalImageRequest request)
      Generates an image from a text prompt using the active image model.

      The method resolves the active ImageModel from the registry, invokes it with Stable Diffusion defaults (512×512, N=1), and extracts the raw image bytes from the response using multiple fallback strategies (base64, reflection, URL).

      Parameters:
      request - The image generation request containing the text prompt.
      Returns:
      The generated image response with raw bytes, Data URL, and format metadata.
      Throws:
      CoreException - If no ImageModel is registered for the active provider.

    • generateSpeech

      public byte[] generateSpeech(InternalSpeechRequest request)
      Generates speech audio from text using the active TTS model.

      Resolves the user's preferred voice from the request context's preferences (defaults to "alloy") and delegates to the registered TextToSpeechModel.

      Parameters:
      request - The speech request containing the text and user context.
      Returns:
      The raw audio bytes (MP3 format).
      Throws:
      CoreException - If no TextToSpeechModel is registered for the active provider.
